title: Sacks 'N Such
description: A backpack type mod for TFC:TNG
body:
Have you ever felt the TFC vessels lacking when exploring the world? Do you wish there was more options for transporting items?


Sacks 'N Such adds mainly sacks. The most notable being the Ore Sack allowing for TFC ore to be stored incredibly dense while out mining, even automatically storing picked up ores! The cheapest and most simple Container Item is made of thatch storing little but cheap to make. More expensive item containers like the Leather Sack or Burlap Sack hold more items or in the case of the Frame Pack has is a whole 18 slots allowing you to store up to large items though due to the weight you can only carry one with items inside without being overburdened. 
 

This mod is very configurable and said config is targeted for pack devs if you want something configurable that isn't already please send me a message or make an issue on [GitHub](https://github.com/Traister101/Sacks-and-Such/issues/new). The defaults I ship are what I feel is good for the mod but ultimately it's there for people to play with.
